title: taraxacum vulgare
intro: Taraxacum vulgare, also known as common dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Asia but now found worldwide. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum vulgare include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum vulgare include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be made from the plant's leaves, roots, or flowers, and are often used to promote overall well-being and health.
